apps.name: paus
apps.subtitle: Think before you spend by seeing prices in work hours.
apps.description: paus helps people slow down impulse purchases by turning item prices into work hours and making spending decisions feel more intentional.
apps.longDescription: paus helps people slow down impulse purchases by turning item prices into work hours and making spending decisions feel more intentional. The app tracks spending and saving choices, lets users pause uncertain purchases with reminders, supports multiple currencies and languages, and adapts to personal financial goals.
features: Converting item prices into work hours
Personalizing the experience based on financial goals
